name: get_block
content:
The system shall support
single sign-on (SSO) via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect for enterprise customers.

name: get_block
content:
API response times shall
not exceed 200ms at the 95th percentile under normal load conditions
(defined as 5000 concurrent users).
req-1 requires enterprise SSO via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect. req-8 sets a 200ms 95th-percentile API response-time target at normal load.
